message:
fix(gui): correct multi-quad test expectation for triangle winding order

The build_quad_indices_offset_each_quad_by_vertex_stride test expected
V_BOT_LEFT before V_BOT_RIGHT in the second triangle (indices 1,2,3),
but the function correctly produces V_BOT_RIGHT before V_BOT_LEFT
(indices 1,3,2) for consistent CCW winding. The single-quad test had
the correct expectation; align the multi-quad test to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
